description: Compose or normalize a Codex pet 8x9 spritesheet atlas (1536x1872) and write a transparent PNG, copying only the used cells per row and zeroing transparent-pixel RGB residue.
rules: local-only — reads frames or a source atlas, writes a normalized atlas PNG
provide exactly one source: SOURCE_ATLAS (an existing atlas to normalize) or FRAMES_ROOT (per-state frame dirs)
atlas written to record_store as atlas.png
usage: Set SOURCE_ATLAS (path to an atlas to normalize) OR FRAMES_ROOT (a dir of per-state frame folders). Output: atlas.png.
limitation: Composition only; does not generate art or validate output (use validate-atlas after). Requires Pillow (PIL); without it the porter writes a placeholder file.
